title: conversion of whitespaces string to double or float is accepted without an error during insert
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TEST_DOUBLE(f1 DOUBLE NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO TEST_DOUBLE(f1) VALUES (CAST('   ' AS DOUBLE));
INSERT INTO TEST_DOUBLE(f1) VALUES (CAST('0.0' AS DOUBLE));
INSERT INTO TEST_FLOAT(f1) VALUES (CAST('\t\n  ' AS FLOAT));
key_bug_features: Inserting whitespace strings into double or float columns
